No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3), enhances language skills (4.4), and improves cultural literacy and international perspective (4.7), making a strong direct contribution.
evidence: 可提高俄語學習者文化、科技、美學等素養
具備人文素養及國際宏觀視野

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The topic 'Река Волга' (Volga River) provides a tangential, linguistic link to water-related ecosystems (Target 6.6), as identified by Model B and adopted by Model A.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The link between cultural topics and sustainable tourism (Target 8.9) is too indirect and weak for a language course to warrant a score.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The mention of 'technological literacy' (科技素養) is a very weak and indirect link to enhancing industrial technological capabilities (Target 9.5) in a language course.
evidence: 可提高俄語學習者文化、科技、美學等素養

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Course content on 'Сказочный мир России,' 'Праздники,' and 'Петр Чайковский' directly supports the appreciation and safeguarding of cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: The topic 'Рассказ о море' (A Story about the Sea) provides a tangential, linguistic link to marine ecosystems (Target 14.2), as identified by Model B and adopted by Model A.

Life on Land.reason: The topic 'Река Волга' (Volga River) provides a tangential, linguistic link to inland freshwater ecosystems (Target 15.1), as identified by Model B and adopted by Model A.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The topic 'День Победы' (Victory Day) offers a cultural context related to the end of a major conflict, indirectly contributing to a culture of peace.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's core competency of fostering an 'international macro-perspective' (國際宏觀視野) directly supports building capacity for global partnerships (Target 17.16).
evidence: 具備人文素養及國際宏觀視野
